description: Comprehensive test suite: 4 layers — unit (199 tests), integration (5 tests), E2E (15 tests), pre-release (41 tests). Shared fixtures: IrcProbe, CLI runner factory, Zellij session management.

pre_release.run_cmd: uv run pytest tests/pre_release/ -v -m 'prerelease and not manual'

shared_helpers: tests/shared/irc_probe.py: IrcProbe — thread-safe IRC client, message recording, WHOIS, pattern wait, TLS+SASL
tests/shared/cli_runner.py: make_cli_runner() — factory for CLI runner with env injection
tests/shared/zellij_helpers.py: ensure_session, new_tab, send_command, dump_screen, kill_session

pre_release_infrastructure.reporting.py: PreReleaseReportCollector — JSON+Markdown reports, 10 checklist categories, gate status PASS/PASS_WITH_RISKS/FAIL
pre_release_infrastructure.verify_walkthrough.py: Parses asciinema .cast, checks 8 required patterns (zchat doctor → zchat shutdown)

e2e_flow: 9-phase ordered: weechat_connects → agent_joins → agent_send → mention_reply → second_agent → agent_to_agent → alice_bob → agent_stop → shutdown
coverage_gaps: No unit tests for zchat.cli.zellij module
